description_long: This is a fine porcelain plate set with a matching teacup, both featuring a delicate gold rim and ornate gold decorative patterns. The plate is round, white, and bordered with intricate gold and colored detailing, giving it an elegant and luxurious appearance. The teacup sits centered on the plate and has a gold handle and matching gold trim along the rim and base. Accompanying the set are black utensils, including a fork, knife, and spoon, placed beside or behind the plate in different views. The porcelain surfaces are glossy and smooth, reflecting light and emphasizing their high-quality finish. The overall set is compact, suitable for serving tea or small desserts, and would typically be found in upscale dining or café settings.
description: A white porcelain plate with ornate gold trim and a matching teacup, accompanied by black utensils. The set is elegant, glossy, and finely detailed.
description_view_0: The plate and teacup are seen from the front, with the gold handle of the cup visible and black utensils placed to the left.
description_view_1: The set is viewed from the back, showing the rear of the teacup and plate, with utensils stacked behind the cup.
description_view_2: The plate and teacup are seen from the right side, with the gold handle prominent and utensils placed to the right.
description_view_3: The set is viewed from the rear, with the gold handle of the cup on the left and utensils standing upright in front.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Gold decorative patterns and trim are visible on the plate and teacup.
attribute_surrounding_context: Black utensils are placed adjacent to the plate and teacup.
